title: University of Southampton Delhi Health and Wellbeing Overview
text: Health and wellbeing: See how we care for each student physically, mentally and emotionally, and make sure they can study and live in safety.
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi prioritizes student physical, mental, and emotional health, ensuring a safe environment for study and living.

title: Campus Infirmary Medical and Counselling Services
text: Campus infirmary: Open from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM, staffed by a qualified nurse to assist with any medical needs. A professional counsellor is available on Mondays and Wednesdays (11:00 AM – 5:00 PM) to offer mental health and wellbeing support. A doctor is available for consultations on Mondays, Tuesdays, Thursdays, and Fridays (12:00 PM – 2:00 PM) to address health concerns and emergencies.
summary: The campus infirmary offers daily medical assistance by a nurse, with a doctor available on weekdays and a counsellor for mental health support twice a week.

title: Accommodation Infirmary Medical and Mental Health Support
text: University accommodation: The accommodation infirmary is staffed by a nurse from 8:00 PM to 8:00 AM, providing 24-hour medical assistance. A counsellor is available on Saturdays (11:00 AM – 5:00 PM) for mental health support. A doctor is available on Sundays (11:00 AM – 1:00 PM) for continued medical care and consultations for residents.
summary: The university accommodation provides 24-hour nurse staffing, weekend mental health counselling, and Sunday doctor consultations for resident students.

title: University Partnership with Marengo Asia Hospital for Emergencies
text: Hospital partnership: The University has partnered with the multi-specialty hospital Marengo Asia, and an ambulance service is available on call for emergencies.
summary: The University partners with Marengo Asia, a multi-specialty hospital, ensuring ambulance service availability for student emergencies.

title: Free Shuttle Bus Service for Student Travel
text: You might also want to know How can I travel between the student hostel and campus? Perhaps the best way to get to campus in the morning from our student hostel, or back there again at night, is the private shuttle bus. This free service will run at regular intervals every weekday.
summary: A free private shuttle bus provides regular weekday transport between the student hostel and campus for convenience.
